hooks.prompt: Before ending this turn, check: (1) uncommitted git changes not yet explained to Aaron, (2) real progress this turn not yet reflected in docs/current-state.md or docs/next-task.md, (3) a natural stopping point where /save-state or /baton-pass should be offered. If any apply, do not just stop - tell Aaron what's unresolved and offer to run /save-state. Otherwise, let the turn end normally.
